title: CVE-1999-1481 — CVSS 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-1999-1481

CVSS Score: 5.0 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 1999-12-31T05:00:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-Other

Squid 2.2.STABLE5 and below, when using external authentication, allows attackers to bypass access controls via a newline in the user/password pair.

References: http://www.securityfocus.com/archive/1/33295, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/741, http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v2/2.2/bugs/
